question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $72,000 on April 16?

payload.main_thesis: BTC is already modestly above the 72k threshold, so the outside-view favors the Binance noon ET April 16 close staying above 72,000 absent a meaningful downside move.
quote_anchors: This market will resolve to 'Yes' if the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT 12:00 in the ET timezone has a final 'Close' price higher than the price specified.

strongest_disconfirmers: BTC can move more than 2% in a day, and a single-minute settlement print is fragile to late selloffs or wicks.
strongest_supports: Direct Binance 1m klines during the run showed BTC/USDT around 73.68k-73.73k, already above the threshold.

unresolved_ambiguities: Operational timestamp/candle-label handling is mostly clear but still matters in single-minute contracts.
